order.title: Place Your Order — Don't Wait! for a Heavy Cargo Unit
order.orderDedicatedServer: Place Your Order — Don't Wait! for a Dedicated Heavy Cargo Unit
order.hostnameHelp: Use the unit designation to identify the cargo unit. The property deed does not need to be valid or registered. One period is required in the unit designation. Other examples: database.local, web.server or your.name.
order.passwordRequirement: Note: Secret Access Code must contain at least 8 characters, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one number, a special character.
order.currentlySoldOut: Currently sold out — more stock arriving soon!
order.contactSales: Please contact our Customer Support Desk.
order.autoRenewNotice: The subscription will automatically renew after every month at {cost} until canceled.
order.tosAcknowledgement: By checking this box, you acknowledge that you are purchasing a subscription product that automatically renews (As Per The Terms Outlined Above) and is billed to the payment card you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the customer portal select the active service and click the Void the Agreement link or email at: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Terms and Conditions. By checking the box and clicking Place My Order below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.iAgreeToTerms: I have read the terms above and I agree.
